2604.07276.title: Making Room for AI: Multi-GPU Molecular Dynamics with Deep Potentials in GROMACS
2604.07276.paper_summary: GROMACS is a de-facto standard for classical Molecular Dynamics (MD). The rise of AI-driven interatomic potentials that pursue near-quantum accuracy at MD throughput now poses a significant challenge: embedding neural-network inference into multi-GPU simulations retaining high-performance. In this work, we integrate the MLIP framework DeePMD-kit into GROMACS, enabling domain-decomposed, GPU-accelerated inference across multi-node systems. We extend the GROMACS NNPot interface with a DeePMD backend, and we introduce a domain decomposition layer decoupled from the main simulation. The inference is executed concurrently on all processes, with two MPI collectives used each step to broadcast coordinates and to aggregate and redistribute forces. We train an in-house DPA-1 model (1.6 M parameters) on a dataset of solvated protein fragments. We validate the implementation on a small protein system, then we benchmark the GROMACS-DeePMD integration with a 15,668 atom protein on NVIDIA A100 and AMD MI250x GPUs up to 32 devices. Strong-scaling efficiency reaches 66% at 16 devices and 40% at 32; weak-scaling efficiency is 80% to 16 devices and reaches 48% (MI250x) and 40% (A100) at 32 devices. Profiling with the ROCm System profiler shows that >90% of the wall time is spent in DeePMD inference, while MPI collectives contribute <10%, primarily since they act as a global synchronization point. The principal bottlenecks are the irreducible ghost-atom cost set by the cutoff radius, confirmed by a simple throughput model, and load imbalance across ranks. These results demonstrate that production MD with near ab initio fidelity is feasible at scale in GROMACS.
2604.07276.paper_summary_zh: GROMACS 是經典分子動力學 (MD) 的事實標準。隨著追求接近量子精度的 AI 驅動的原子間勢能的興起，現在提出了一個重大挑戰：在保持高性能的多 GPU 模擬中嵌入神經網絡推理。在這項工作中，我們將 MLIP 框架 DeePMD-kit 整合到 GROMACS 中，使得在多節點系統中能夠進行域分解的 GPU 加速推理。我們擴展了 GROMACS NNPot 接口，增加了一個 DeePMD 後端，並引入了一個與主模擬解耦的域分解層。推理在所有進程上同時執行，每一步使用兩個 MPI 集體來廣播坐標並聚合和重新分配力。我們在一個溶劑化蛋白片段的數據集上訓練了一個內部 DPA-1 模型（1.6 M 參數）。我們在一個小型蛋白系統上驗證了實現，然後在 NVIDIA A100 和 AMD MI250x GPU 上對一個 15,668 原子的蛋白進行 GROMACS-DeePMD 整合的基準測試，最多可達 32 台設備。強擴展效率在 16 台設備時達到 66%，在 32 台時達到 40%；弱擴展效率在 16 台設備時為 80%，在 32 台設備時達到 48%（MI250x）和 40%（A100）。使用 ROCm 系統分析器進行的分析顯示，超過 90% 的牆時花費在 DeePMD 推理上，而 MPI 集體的貢獻不到 10%，主要因為它們作為全局同步點。主要瓶頸是由截止半徑設定的不可減少的幽靈原子成本，這一點通過一個簡單的吞吐量模型得到了確認，並且各個等級之間存在負載不平衡。這些結果表明，在 GROMACS 中以接近從頭算的精度進行生產 MD 在規模上是可行的。
2604.07276.author: Luca Pennati et.al.
2604.07276.authors: Luca Pennati, Andong Hu, Ivy Peng, Lukas Müllender, Stefano Markidis
